description: Push-to-talk hotkey (default CAPS LOCK) triggers audio recording.
Configurable hotkey — user can change keybind from tray menu, persisted in config.json.
Audio capture via sounddevice at 16kHz with real-time level monitoring.
Speech-to-text via faster-whisper (CTranslate2 backend) — fast GPU inference.
Experimental RO Whisper support — TransferRapid/whisper-large-v3-turbo_ro loaded via HuggingFace repo ID, faster-whisper handles download+conversion natively.
GPU-accelerated inference using CUDA with automatic CTranslate2 device selection.
CPU fallback when no NVIDIA GPU is detected (uses int8 compute type).
CUDA DLL directory bootstrap at startup to ensure CTranslate2 finds all NVIDIA libs.
Auto-paste transcribed text to the last focused window via pyperclip + Ctrl+V.
Config persistence — all settings stored in config.json, loaded on every access.
Transcription history — last 5 results stored in config.json, accessible from tray.
Autostart with Windows — registry key written/deleted via winreg HKCU Run.
Language selection (Romanian / English) — affects Whisper decode + cleanup patterns.
Enable/disable toggle — suspends hotkey listening without exiting the app.
Hallucination guards — rejects prompt echoes (>75% similarity), punctuation-only, <2 chars, digits-only, non-Romanian, >5 words/second.
Audio validation — rejects clips <0.35s, peak <0.015, RMS <0.006, short+silent combos.
Quick fix corrections — regex patterns for common Whisper misrecognitions (e.g. Excel->exe, caps loc->Caps Lock).
Level 1 Raw — returns text as-is with only whitespace trimming.
Level 2 Balanced — removes Romanian/English fillers, duplicate words, basic punctuation fix.
Level 3 Aggressive — Level 2 plus leading conjunctions removed, sentence capitalization, period appended.
Level 4 Mega-aggressive — Level 3 plus complex filler patterns and short sentence filtering.
Context-aware cleanup — auto-detects active window process name and title, maps to cleanup context.
Context mapping — Slack/Discord/Teams to casual, VSCode/Terminal to raw, Word/Notion to document, browser to formal.
Manual context override — user can force a specific context (casual/formal/document/raw) from tray.
Punctuation fixer — removes overloaded commas, fixes comma-before-conjunctions, trims trailing commas.
Voice command 'sterge asta' triggers Ctrl+Z (undo) on the target window.
Voice command 'selecteaza tot' triggers Ctrl+A (select all) on the target window.
Voice command 'anuleaza' cancels paste — no text is sent to the window.
Voice command 'trimite' triggers Ctrl+Enter (send message) on the target window.
Diacritics-normalized command matching — Romanian diacritics are stripped before pattern matching.
Keyword fallback detection — matches the last word of the transcription against command keywords.
Target window focus restore — SetForegroundWindow to saved HWND before sending keystrokes.
System tray icon using pystray — zero visible UI at idle, all interaction via right-click menu.
WebRapid logo as tray icon — PNG logo displayed for idle/done/disabled states, fallback to programmatic WR icon.
State-aware icon colors — green=idle/done, red=recording, blue=loading/processing, dim=disabled.
Recording animation — background thread pulses icon between bright red dot and dim red dot at 0.5s intervals.
Dynamic tooltip — tray_icon.title updated on every set_state() call showing current app status.
Left-click tray icon toggles pill overlay show/hide via default=True invisible menu item.
Status label at top of tray menu showing current state.
Model submenu — Tiny, Base, Small, Medium, Large v3, Turbo, Turbo RO (Experimental); current model prefixed with >.
Language submenu — Romanian / English toggle, persisted to config.
Cleanup level submenu — levels 1-4 with descriptive labels, current level marked with >.
Context override submenu — Auto/Casual/Formal/Document/Raw options, persisted to config.
Active window title display in menu — shows short title of currently focused window.
Transcription history submenu — last 5 results as clickable items that copy text to clipboard.
Voice commands info submenu — read-only list of all available voice commands and their keyboard actions.
Enable/Disable toggle — suspends hotkey listening without closing the app.
Autostart toggle from tray — writes or removes the Windows registry Run key for WR Voice.
Clean exit — unhooks keyboard, stops tray, then os._exit(0).
Tray menu auto-rebuild on state or config change via rebuild_tray_menu().
Floating pill overlay — frameless transparent topmost window, centered horizontally above taskbar.
Waveform animation — animated green bars of varying heights during recording state.
Loading animation — cycling dots animation during loading and processing states.
Logo on pill — WebRapid W logo displayed on left side of pill overlay.
Pill drag to reposition — user can drag pill to any screen position via mouse.
Pill auto-hide when idle — window withdraws automatically on idle and done state.
Frameless always-on-top window — overrideredirect(True) + topmost attribute prevents losing the window.
Window drag via header — ButtonPress-1 and B1-Motion bindings on header bar and title label.
Windows 11 rounded corners — DwmSetWindowAttribute with DWMWA_WINDOW_CORNER_PREFERENCE=DWMWCP_ROUND.
Fade-in entrance animation — alpha 0.0 to 1.0 over approximately 270ms at 60fps via after(16).
Button hover transitions — Enter/Leave color change bindings on every button.
Language selector (ro/en) — separate dialog before main installer window.
System check screen — detects GPU (nvidia-smi + PyTorch fallback), VRAM, RAM, recommends model.
GPU detection with PyTorch fallback — tries nvidia-smi first, then torch.cuda for RTX 5080/Blackwell.
Model recommendation by VRAM — automatically pre-selects the best Whisper model for detected GPU.
Model selection dropdown — 5 Whisper models (tiny/base/small/medium/large-v3) with VRAM info.
Install path browser — user can change destination folder via tkinter filedialog.
Threaded installation — all install steps run in background thread so UI stays responsive.
Live log display during installation — scrollable text widget with step-by-step output.
Animated progress bar — green fill with percentage label.
Standalone EXE copy — copies bundled WR Voice.exe and Uninstall.exe to install dir.
Config.json generation — writes fresh config with selected model, language, cleanup_level=2.
Done screen — shows success checkmark, chosen model, language, and Launch WR Voice button.
Bundled uninstall.exe included in installer EXE and copied to install dir during setup.
App files removal — deletes WR Voice.exe, config.json, logo from install directory.
Optional model cache removal — checkbox to delete downloaded Whisper models (~1-10 GB).
Self-delete — batch file waits 2s, deletes uninstaller EXE and install folder.
Clean tkinter UI — centered 420x400 window with dark theme matching installer style.
Single-file installer EXE via PyInstaller + UPX — bundles app EXE + uninstaller (~165 MB).
Standalone app EXE via PyInstaller — ~140 MB single-file with all dependencies.
Uninstaller spec — uninstall.spec builds standalone Uninstall.exe (~10 MB).
Offline pre-conversion script — scripts/download_turbo_ro.py for pre-downloading Turbo RO model.
